sourceNoteIntro: This Pulse uses CRMLS / InfoSparks data for Avalon, with the article read and chart defaulting to the Residential / Single family live MLS slice sourced from 7/5/2026. The broader Residential export is also available from 7/2/2026. It also uses official city, school, federal, state, and consumer sources for local due-diligence context. Use this as orientation, not a property valuation, legal opinion, lending quote, insurance opinion, school assignment, or forecast.

notes: Housing Market Pulse generated from structured manifest. Keyword intent angle: thin sample pricing confidence. Primary keyword: Avalon housing market update. Google Keyword Planner seed queries: Avalon housing market; Avalon real estate market update; Avalon home prices July 2026; should I sell my house in Avalon; Avalon home selling market; Avalon homes for sale inventory; Avalon days on market; Avalon listing price; Avalon seller market; Avalon housing market 2026; Avalon market update sellers; Avalon median home price; are home prices dropping in Avalon; is now a good time to sell in Avalon. Research packet records editorial context. Visible avatar labels are prohibited and were not used in public page headings, badges, or category labels. Market metrics reviewed: medianSalePrice, averageSalePrice, averagePpsf, medianOriginalPrice, newListings, activeInventory, pendingSales, closedSales, monthsSupply, medianDaysOnMarket, averageDaysOnMarket. Missing/no-data metrics: closedVolume, totalClosedSides, medianLastListPrice, averageLastListPrice, medianShowsToContract, averageShowsToContract, showsPerListing.
